title: MineMTR Experimental
description: The experimental version of the modpack MineMTR.
body:
The experimental version of the modpack MineMTR. In this pack, you can enjoy the game of the creator of the MineMTR server.

You can create trains, boats and even planes here. Giving advice to this modpack is welcomed.

This pack didn't provide a server version at this time, but you can make the server pack yourself - this is allowed.
